hypothesis: The systems-optimizer machine becomes more deterministic if every ratchet declares an explicit measurement and keep rule, and accepted slices must record one learning item in state.
measurement: The systems-optimizer verifier must fail if backlog items omit measurement or keep_rule fields, or if kept changes omit a recorded learning item.
keep_rule: Keep only if the fixed bundle stays clean after the stricter verifier and state/backlog ratchet card are added.
learning_item: Optimizer ratchets need explicit measurement and keep rules in backlog plus a retained learning_item in state, or repeated XR/autonomy failures remain under-specified.
